pages.raw_text:
The Northern Pacific railway re-
Gently opened its corporation heart
for the benefit of its over-worked
and under-paid employees. An in
crease in wages of $40 per month
was granted men who had been re-
ceiving $50 per month, and those
who were paid $50 were advanced
to $40. Another generous action
the company has taken is selling
its employees coal at cost. A bulie.
tin was posted few days ago to
this effect. The notice had only
been up a few hours when the total
amount of coal subscribed for by
the railroad men footed up total
of over 400 tons. The men say that
aside from the coal costing much
less than the local dealers were
selling it they were previously I'm.
able at times to secure fuel at any
price.


Train crews are being worked
night and day in an effort to catch
up with the business delayed by
the floods.
